title: A round red UFO observed in Curitiba by three people [1998]

text_preview:
FEB 10th, 1998. Time: 9:00 pm. Duration: 15 minutes. Under a partially cloudy sky, in the neighborhood of Água Verde, in Curitiba, State of Paraná, three people observed a round red UFO similar to a star. According to witnesses, the unidentified flying object was at low speed, but at a “very high” altitude on its North/South trajectory. They couldn’t inform the approximate altitude of the object they sighted.

Cf. ARQUIVO NACIONAL (Brasil). Sistema de Informações do Arquivo Nacional (SIAN). Fundo ‘Objeto Voador Não Identificado (OVNI)’. Código de Referência BR DFANBSB ARX.0.0.511. “Questionári
summary: Three witnesses in Água Verde, Curitiba observed a round red star-like UFO moving slowly at very high altitude on a North/South trajectory for 15 minutes.
